channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: PowerShell Is Underrated
item.description: Originally published on lavkesh.com I think people underestimate PowerShell, seeing it as just another shell for automating Windows. But it's actually one of the best scripting languages for...

item.title: Objects in JavaScript
item.description: Objects are one of the most important concepts in JavaScript. Almost everything in JavaScript revolves around objects. Objects help us store related data together and represent real-world entities...

item.title: The Alert Never Fired Because the Loop Skipped the Last Line of the File
item.description: We kept a plaintext file of hostnames, one per line, and a monitoring script read the file and pinged each host every five minutes. When a host failed to respond, the script sent an email alert....

item.title: Introducing Tigera Lynx
item.description: Today we're announcing the general availability of Tigera Lynx, a unified control plane for Kubernetes-native AI agents. Lynx gives enterprises a single place to find every agent in their...

item.title: Types of Functions in JavaScript
item.description: Functions are one of the most important concepts in JavaScript. They help us organize code, avoid repetition, and make programs easier to understand and maintain. Think of a function as a machine:...

item.title: Strangler Fig: migrare il legacy un pezzo alla volta
item.description: Il problema: il sistema legacy che non puoi spegnere Hai un gestionale PHP 5.6 con 200.000 righe di codice, nessun test, query SQL inline ovunque, e HTML mescolato con logica di business. Il...

item.title: The PostgreSQL mental model that finally clicked for me
item.description: What i was learning Today i started learning PostgreSQL , the objective was to create a mental model to build a strong foundation and potentially a smooth learning curve for PostgreSQL. What...

item.title: MCP Server Security: What Zero-Touch OAuth Means for Your Content Stack
item.description: The Model Context Protocol community just shipped a significant security update: Enterprise-Managed Authorization (EMA) is now stable. The official announcement landed on the MCP blog this week...

item.title: When adding a feature broke a dozen classes
item.description: Originally published on lavkesh.com I've been stung more than once by code that looked fine until a new feature arrived. Suddenly I'm editing a dozen unrelated classes and wondering why the whole...

item.title: Hue’s wired wall modules bring non-smart lights into its ecosystem
item.description: Smart lighting company Philips Hue has launched its first wired wall modules. Installed behind existing wall switches, the new devices bring non-smart lights into the Hue ecosystem for the first...

item.title: Is the US government’s Anthropic ban accidentally helping the brand?
item.description: Just as last week was ending, the US government forced Anthropic to pull its two newest models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5, citing national security concerns after Amazon researchers allegedly found a...

item.title: The US banned Anthropic’s Fable 5 release, but the numbers don’t seem to care

item.title: AutoJack Attack Lets One Web Page Hijack AI Agent for Host Code Execution
item.description: Microsoft researchers have detailed an exploit chain, named AutoJack, that turns an AI browsing agent into a delivery vehicle for remote code execution. Steer the agent to load an attacker's web...

item.title: Billionaire Ambani wants AI in every call, app, and home
item.description: Reliance is weaving AI into telecom services used by more than 500 million people.

item.title: Operation Endgame Disrupts SocGholish Servers, Cleans 14,971 WordPress Sites
item.description: Dutch law enforcement authorities, along with counterparts from Canada , Germany, and the U.S., have disrupted malicious infrastructure associated with SocGholish and cleaned up nearly 15,000...

item.title: The NTS Radio Player brings the best of internet radio to your hi-fi
item.description: NTS Radio and Swedish audio company Atonemo have teamed up on a dedicated player that brings NTS's genre-defying mixes and streaming stations to almost any stereo or speaker setup. And, like...

item.title: The film about Sam Altman has been dropped by Amazon MGM
item.description: Luca Guadagnino's film about OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, Artificial, has reportedly been dropped by Amazon MGM. The film, which stars Andrew Garfield and covers the rollercoaster five days in 2023...

item.title: CISA Warns Fortinet Customers as FortiBleed Hits 86,644 FortiGate Devices
item.description: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Thursday urged Fortinet customers with FortiGate appliances to take steps to secure against ongoing malicious activity aimed at...

item.title: Our long national sunscreen nightmare is almost over
item.description: This is Optimizer, a weekly newsletter sent from Verge senior reviewer Victoria Song that dissects and discusses the latest gizmos and potions that swear they're going to change your life. Opt in...

item.title: The CEO of Allbirds’ new AI biz has a plan, but no employees
item.description: Call it a startup with a sole founder and a very large seed round, but what's next is less clear.

item.title: T1 Phone PR firm is ‘not assisting Trump Mobile any further’
item.description: Where's the Trump phone? We're going to keep talking about it every week. We don't have the phones we preordered yet, but this week we received unexpected news from Trump Mobile's media relations...

item.title: The Download: AI bottleneck debates, and BCI trials take off
item.description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. A startup claims it broke through a bottleneck that’s...

item.title: In season 2 of Sugar, Colin Farrell’s quirky detective becomes much more human
item.description: When Colin Farrell was doing press for the first season of the detective series Sugar, he had to be very careful with how he spoke. Sugar is a story about a quirky private detective, but it's also...

item.title: Kaleidescape’s movie player blows streaming, and your wallet, away
item.description: We've lost something in the past 15 years. Netflix, Amazon, Disney, Apple; they've all convinced us that streaming is the best way to watch movies and shows at home. With everything at our...

item.title: From Assistive to Agentic: The AI Shift That's Redefining Threat Management
item.description: Introduction The average enterprise security team has 40 or more security tools, giving a lot of visibility into internal telemetry and asset data. But often, these tools are working in siloes,...

item.title: Anthropic’s Fable and the State of AI
item.description: On June 9th, Anthropic released its Fable generative AI model. Three days later, the US government classified it as a dangerous munition, and used its export-control authority to prohibit any...

item.title: A startup claims it broke through a bottleneck that’s holding back LLMs
item.description: Miami-based AI startup Subquadratic came out of stealth mode last month with a huge claim. It announced that it had solved a mathematical bottleneck that had been holding back large language...

item.title: Forget Data Leakage: Shadow AI's Real Threat Is Access Control
item.description: The first wave of enterprise AI concern was straightforward. It was simply employees pasting sensitive data into public AI tools. Security teams responded with usage policies, domain blocks, and...

item.title: Salesforce Disables Klue App Integration After OAuth Token Abuse Exposes Customer Data
item.description: Salesforce has revealed that it disabled the Klue Battlecards app integration within its platform in response to a security incident impacting the competitive intelligence company on June 11,...
